overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Red Dead Redemption 2 showing a cowboy character walking along a dirt trail through rural countryside at night. The character passes a crossroads with a wooden signpost, encounters a horse rider, and approaches a lit wooden farmstead with a large barn.

events.description: rider on horseback passes by on the right side of the trail

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the dirt path away from the crossroads

notable_agents.action: rider on brown horse trotting past the character on the right

entered.detail: weathered wooden signpost with multiple directional arms at the crossroads
unpaved dirt path winding through grassy terrain
dense cluster of oak trees lining the left side of the trail
scattered trees and bushes on the right side of the path

segments.scene_description: The segment begins at a rural crossroads at night, with a weathered wooden signpost marking the intersection. The character walks steadily along a dirt trail as a horse rider passes by on the right. The surroundings consist of open fields with oak trees lining both sides of the path under a clear night sky.

agents.ego_description: continuing along the winding dirt trail through open fields toward distant lights

entered.detail: wooden telegraph pole alongside the trail
large white wooden barn with warm interior light visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: The character proceeds along a tree-lined dirt trail leaving the crossroads behind. A wooden utility pole appears alongside the path, and a distant barn with warm lighting becomes visible on the horizon. The trail continues through open grassy fields flanked by oak trees.

events.description: approaching the lit farmstead buildings, artificial light from the barn becomes more prominent against the dark surroundings

agents.ego_description: walking toward the illuminated farm buildings that are growing larger in the frame

entered.detail: smaller wooden structure with lit windows to the right of the main barn
white wooden fence marking the property boundary
wooden wagon or cart parked near the farm buildings

segments.scene_description: The character approaches the farmstead as the main barn grows from a distant light to a prominent structure. A secondary building and wooden fence become visible on the right, along with a parked wagon. The lighting shifts from pure moonlight to a mix of natural and warm artificial light emanating from the barn's open doors.

agents.ego_description: approaching the main barn entrance and entering the immediate farmstead area

entered.detail: wooden water trough for livestock near the barn
exterior lantern illuminating the barn entrance

segments.scene_description: The character arrives at the farmstead courtyard, with the main barn now dominating the left side of the frame. Details of the weathered wooden structure become clear, including an exterior lantern and open doors revealing warm interior light. A water trough and wagon are visible in the yard as the character approaches the barn entrance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a rural dirt trail at night, transitioning from an open crossroads into the warm glow of a remote farmstead. It begins at a weathered wooden signpost where a horse rider passes by, moving steadily through open fields lined with oak trees under a clear night sky. As the character leaves the intersection behind, the path passes a wooden utility pole while a distant, warmly lit barn emerges on the horizon. The scene then shifts as the character approaches the farmstead, where the moonlight blends with artificial light emanating from a secondary building, a wooden fence, and a parked wagon. Finally, the camera arrives in the courtyard, with the weathered wooden barn and its glowing open doors dominating the frame alongside a water trough and wagon.
